Short Description: VPN drops connection every 10 minutes from home
Description: When working remotely via Cisco AnyConnect VPN, the connection drops approximately every 10 minutes. I have to re-authenticate each time. My home internet is stable — I've tested with speed tests and other apps work fine.
Customer Comments: I've called about this FOUR times now and nobody has fixed it. I can't do my job from home like this. Every time I call I get a different person who makes me run the same diagnostics. This is beyond frustrating.
Work Notes: Escalated to Endpoint Security for further investigation.

Short Description: Citrix session keeps freezing during patient intake
Description: Citrix Workspace sessions freeze for 30-60 seconds multiple times per hour. When it unfreezes, keystrokes entered during the freeze all appear at once, often in the wrong fields. Happening on all thin clients in our area.
Location: St. Joseph Mercy - Ann Arbor, MI
Resolution Notes: Temporary workaround provided. Permanent fix scheduled for next maintenance window.
Customer Comments: Patient intake is taking twice as long because of this freezing. We have a waiting room full of frustrated patients and I look incompetent sitting here waiting for my screen to unfreeze. How long has this been a known issue?
Work Notes: Assigned to Alex Ramirez. Initial assessment in progress.

Short Description: Application error when generating reports in Epic
Description: When running the 'Daily Census' report in Epic Reporting Workbench, I get error code WDE-1042. The report worked fine last week. Other reports seem to generate normally.
Customer Comments: I can provide the full error log if needed. No rush — we have a manual workaround.
Work Notes: Contacted user for additional details. Awaiting response.

Short Description: Requesting mobile device for rounding physician
Description: Dr. Laura Nguyen needs an iPad Pro with Epic Haiku configured for inpatient rounding. She's a new hospitalist starting May 1. Manager: Dr. Robert Chen. Cost center: 44350.
Location: St. Peter's Health Partners - Albany, NY
Resolution Notes: Unable to reproduce issue. User will reopen if it recurs.
Customer Comments: Standard hospitalist mobile device package. Please coordinate with Dr. Nguyen directly for pickup and training scheduling.
Work Notes: Assigned to Yuki Tanaka. Initial assessment in progress.

Description: Epic Hyperspace freezes and crashes every 15-20 minutes when I'm charting patient notes in the inpatient module. I lose all my unsaved work each time. This has been happening for 3 days now. I've already restarted my workstation twice today.
Customer Comments: This is COMPLETELY unacceptable. I've lost patient notes THREE times today. I'm a nurse with 12 patients and I cannot keep re-entering chart data. Someone needs to fix this NOW or I'm calling my director.
Work Notes: Remote session established. Troubleshooting in progress.

Description: My HP docking station is no longer being detected by my laptop. External monitors and USB peripherals don't connect when docked. I've tried different cables and power cycling the dock.
Resolution Notes: Account unlocked and cached credentials cleared across all devices.
Customer Comments: I have a USB-C adapter as a workaround for the monitor, but I'd like the dock fixed when convenient.
Work Notes: Configuration change applied. Requested user verification.

Short Description: Power strip tripping circuit in server closet
Description: The power strip in the 3rd floor IDF closet trips its breaker when the UPS kicks in during power fluctuations. This has happened twice this month and takes down the floor's network switches temporarily.
Resolution Notes: Unable to reproduce issue. User will reopen if it recurs.
Customer Comments: Facilities has looked at it and says the circuit is rated correctly. May need a different UPS or load balancing.
Work Notes: Configuration change applied. Requested user verification.

Description: Nuance Dragon Medical dictation is dropping words and inserting incorrect terms. 'Administer 10mg morphine' became 'administer morphine' — missing the dosage entirely. This is a clinical documentation risk.
Customer Comments: I've reported this three times. Medication dosages are being omitted from notes. If a nurse acts on an incomplete dictation, a patient could be harmed. I shouldn't have to proofread every single sentence for missing words. Fix this or give us a different product.
Work Notes: Hardware replacement ordered. ETA 2-3 business days.

Short Description: WiFi dead zone in new outpatient wing
Description: There is no WiFi coverage in rooms 302-310 of the new outpatient wing. Clinicians cannot access Epic on their mobile devices in these rooms. We've been open for a week with this issue.
Location: St. Joseph Mercy - Ann Arbor, MI
Resolution Notes: User provided alternate workflow. Root cause under investigation.
Customer Comments: How did we open an entire wing of a hospital without WiFi? Providers are having to walk to the hallway to look things up and then walk back. This is 2026, not 1996. Extremely poor planning.
Work Notes: Checked system logs — no errors found. Scheduling on-site visit.

Short Description: Software update broke my workflow completely
Description: After the overnight Windows update, several of my desktop shortcuts are gone, my default printer changed, and Citrix won't launch. I've been unable to access any clinical applications for 2 hours.
Resolution Notes: User provided alternate workflow. Root cause under investigation.
Customer Comments: Every time IT pushes an update, something breaks. I spend more time on the phone with the help desk than I do with patients. Who tests these updates before pushing them? Clearly nobody who actually uses these systems.
